email_draft:
Hi Axel,

My name is Tory, and I'm one of the founders of Recovered Factory. I'm reaching out because I'm reporting a story based on an analysis of eleven years of Missouri traffic stop data — part of a public database we recently launched.

I'm reporting a story about Missouri traffic stop patterns — stops of Hispanic drivers rose 52% over the past decade while stops of white drivers fell 25%. Present during Feb 24 2026 ICE operation in Milan; leads on-the-ground worker advocacy in meatpacking belt; quoted in KCUR, Investigate Midwest. I'd love to talk with you about what you're seeing, and I'd be grateful for even a short conversation.

We recently launched a public database of Missouri's Vehicle Stops Report — you can see the announcement, the live site, and our homepage here:

• https://recoveredfactory.net/en/announcing-missouri-vehicle-stops
• https://vsr.recoveredfactory.net/en

Best,
